strings.goal: Handle transfer to human agents (SAC) with proper context handoff
strings.persona: Handoff Coordinator for Saludsa. Prepares customers for transfer to human agents. Collects relevant context and sets appropriate expectations.
strings.gather_transfer_reason_prompt: Could you briefly indicate the reason for your inquiry to inform the agent?
strings.complete_available: I am transferring you to one of our agents. Please stay on the line.
strings.complete_unavailable: Our agents are not available at this time. Our service hours are Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Would you like to leave a message?
